UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: User profile containing Etsy API connection status and preferences

etsyConnected.description: Whether the user's Etsy account is connected

etsyToken.description: Encrypted or temporary Etsy access token, if connected

lastProductType.description: The most recently selected product type

EtsyListing.title: EtsyListing
EtsyListing.description: Information about a digital product listing generated and saved by the user

userId.description: The UID of the owning user

folderName.description: Name of the digital product folder

status.description: Current status of the listing process

productType.description: Category folder type (png_graphics, printable_wallart, presets, planners)

pipelineStepText.description: Current description text of pipeline step progress

mockupImage.description: Base64 coded mockup illustration or previews data url

price.description: Suggested or final listing price in USD

listingId.description: The physical Etsy Listing ID, if published successfully

listingUrl.description: The physical Etsy Listing URL, if published

users/{userId}.description: Contains user preference details and Etsy shop mapping

users/{userId}/listings/{listingId}.description: Pre-generated listings associated with a user account
